history.text: Costa Rica became independent from Spain, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Costa Rica became independent from First Mexican Empire, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Costa Rica became independent from the Federal Republic of Central America, marking a key step in modern statehood.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Costa Rica.
Recognition by Spain strengthened Costa Rica's international status.

worthSeeing.title: Eco-Tourism Pioneer:
worthSeeing.text: 25% of land is protected national park - the world's highest ratio.

worthSeeing.title: Arenal Volcano:
worthSeeing.text: An active stratovolcano surrounded by hot springs and cloud forest.

worthSeeing.title: Manuel Antonio:
worthSeeing.text: A national park where wildlife meets white-sand beach on the Pacific.
